real_questions: Has the enforcement of federal student loan payments affected you?
Any movement in loan modifications recently or over the past few years?
How do you think about high credit limits — some larger banks have gotten in trouble there?
What is the desired market share for mortgages three years out?
What is the personal loan NCO trend line versus general?
Are all originations direct, or would you consider buying or sourcing from brokers?

real_questions.text: Are customers blind to who owns the loan?
sub_types: Online / Digital Bank / Neobank / Fintech Bank

real_questions.text: Is the ultimate purchaser of the loans' credit box different than your own?
sub_types: Online / Digital Bank / Neobank / Fintech Bank

real_questions.text: Can your offtake counterparties shut the spigot off in short order?
sub_types: Online / Digital Bank / Neobank / Fintech Bank

real_questions.text: What are the covenants specifically to the offtake providers?
sub_types: Online / Digital Bank / Neobank / Fintech Bank

real_questions.text: Is credit a covenant in the loan platform agreements?
sub_types: Online / Digital Bank / Neobank / Fintech Bank

real_questions.text: To what extent are you looking to broaden the offtake roster to other banks?
sub_types: Online / Digital Bank / Neobank / Fintech Bank

common_pitfalls: Issuers still over-prep CRE and under-prep the consumer-side cycle story for 2026. Moody's is past CRE and focused on consumer loan performance as the economy cools.

common_pitfalls.text: Issuers with originate-and-distribute / loan offtake programs underestimate Moody's focus on offtake counterparty risk — covenant scope, credit-box divergence, shut-off mechanics, and counterparty diversification.
sub_types: Online / Digital Bank / Neobank / Fintech Bank

agency_intel: Cross-agency theme: CRE is no longer a significant credit concern. Moody's focus has shifted to consumer loan performance as the economy cools.
NBFI lending is a Moody's concern via private credit underwriting quality — same theme as the S&P read, mirrored at Moody's.

agency_intel.text: For loan offtake programs, Moody's probes whether the ultimate purchaser's credit box differs from the originator's (creating adverse-selection risk), how fast the offtake spigot can be cut, and whether credit performance is itself a covenant in the loan-platform agreements.
sub_types: Online / Digital Bank / Neobank / Fintech Bank
